---
id: delete-identity-sessions
title: "Delete & Invalidate an Identity's Sessions"
description: "Calling this endpoint irrecoverably and permanently deletes and invalidates all sessions that belong to the given Identity."
sidebar_label: "Delete & Invalidate an Identity's Sessions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete & Invalidate an Identity's Sessions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/admin/identities/{id}/sessions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Calling this endpoint irrecoverably and permanently deletes and invalidates all sessions that belong to the given Identity.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
